title: Moonshine
logline: In the shadow of the moon, a secret war is fought by those who dare to dream.

acts.summary: The protagonist discovers an ancient artifact that grants power over the moon.
The protagonist must navigate through treacherous lunar terrain while battling rival factions for control.
The protagonist uncovers a conspiracy involving corrupt lunar officials and international espionage.

world_rules: Artifacts found on the moon cannot be tampered with without severe consequences.
